ValidationRule.description: #181987 PM-001852 Repair Localty mandatory when ( CaseCategory=Maintenanace AND ( CaseDetail=Recurrent technical problem))
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), RecordTypeId = '012200000009CuR', ISBLANK( Repair_Locality__c ), ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Category__c ,'Maintenance'), NOT( ISPICKVAL( Origin ,'Email' ) ), ISPICKVAL (External_Case_Detail__c,'Recurrent technical problem') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Field Repair Locality must be filled in.
